regime_fall.current_status: Iran's regime continues military resistance despite leadership succession to Mojtaba Khamenei and appointment of hardline security officials, while maintaining control of the Strait of Hormuz and rejecting U.S. peace proposals; simultaneously facing severe economic collapse, internal repression of dissidents, and a critical leadership vacuum as the IRGC consolidates power.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Iran shot down a U.S. F-35 stealth fighter jet with one crew member rescued and one missing, while the new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei issued hardline statements and hardliners demanded arrest of former Foreign Minister Zarif, signaling regime entrenchment rather than collapse.
